title: GovernanceEvent
description: Reusable type representing a Layer One or Layer Two change event in the ONT governance plane. Records the actor, the change, and the rationale for audit and compliance purposes.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which this governance event occurred.

actor.description: Identity of the principal that caused this governance event. Typically a Kubernetes service account or human user identifier.

actorRole.description: Role of the actor at the time of this event (e.g., Platform Governor, Controller Engineer, Schema Engineer).

layer.description: ONT layer at which this event occurred. Layer one is domain-core; layer two is seam-core and app-core.

fieldChanged.description: JSONPath-style path to the field that changed (e.g., spec.tier, status.admitted).

previousValue.description: String representation of the field value before this change was applied.

newValue.description: String representation of the field value after this change was applied.

rationale.description: Structured rationale for this governance event. Required for governance and binding-state change types.

regulatoryImplication.description: True if this event has regulatory or compliance implications that require audit trail preservation.

gitRef.description: Git commit SHA or tag that corresponds to this governance event, if applicable.

auditEventId.description: Stable external audit event identifier for correlation with audit systems.
